no: Lefreut's SoD Enhanced LeUI Can also be installed after EET_End in the Post-EET phase. Known issue: adds 'sequence' keyword in label blocks of UI.MENU which causes Infinity Loader parse warning (cosmetic only, game still works)

conflicts.reason: UI overhaul mods are mutually exclusive
UI overhaul mods are mutually exclusive
UI overhaul mods are mutually exclusive

These specific EEUITweaks components FORBID LeUI-SoD because LeUI already includes their features. Other EEUITweaks components (Hidden Game Options, chargen utilities, Quick Loot) are fully compatible. WeiDU auto-skips the incompatible components if LeUI-SoD is detected — safe to have both mods in a preset.
conflicts.theirComps: #1080 Portrait Picker #1090 #1091 CharGen Screens #2020 Message Box Resize #2040 Level Up Glow #2060 Dialog Box #2110 Keep Dialog #2900 Record Screen #3020 #3023 #3024 #3070 Journal #3028 #3030 Customize #3040-3045 Identify Items #3050 #3051 Inventory #4005 #4006 #4000 #4010 #4020 #4025 Store Tweaks #5000 Tooltip Scroll #5030 Scroll Bar #5040 #5041 Fonts

conflicts.reason: cdtweaks Colorize NPC Names (cn:250-254) can corrupt NPC name strrefs in large installations, causing hover tooltips to show only HP without character names.

sum: Replaces the default UI with a cleaner, more functional interface using the Siege of Dragonspear visual style. Same functional improvements as the BG1EE skin.
